pages.text: The $(item)Frozen Skyseed$() — snow and ice. Gather them off a $(bold)snowy island$() — or a Rocky island's snow-capped peak (thrown high or over cold).
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A snow-and-ice isle. Snowy, glacier, and deep-freeze looks; spruce trees on the snowy kind. Mind the hidden $(item)powder snow$() pockets.
$(bold)Cold goods$()$(br)$(item)Packed ice$() runs through the core, with rare $(item)blue ice$() deep down. A little iron and coal too.

$(bold)A sealed dome$()$(br)Once in a rare while a Frozen isle grows an $(o)igloo$() — a dark snow hut. Dig in for a chest with a $(item)golden apple$()... and the trapped $(o)zombie villager$() you can cure with it.
